mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_code_group ORDER BY sort_order ASC, group_code ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_code_group WHERE group_code LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR group_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, group_code ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_code_group (group_code, group_name, description, is_active, sort_order, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{groupCode}, #{groupName}, #{description}, #{isActive}, #{sortOrder}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_code_group SET group_name = #{groupName}, description = #{description}, is_active = #{isActive}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
